format.description: The primary content type URN for the Flow.

essence_parameters.title: Data Flow Essence Parameters
essence_parameters.description: Describes the parameters of the essence inside this data Flow

data_type.description: The type of information encoded in the Flow, identified using a URN. e.g. The data_type may be urn:x-tams:data:bounding-box, and the codec `application/json`.

init_segments.description: Whether the Flow makes use of initialisation segments. This parameter MUST be set to `true` if Media Objects have `init_object` populated. If set to `true`, all Media Objects MUST have `init_object` populated. Assume `false` if omitted.
